name: Mercia

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Findern, Willington, Ticknall, Repton, Bretby and Stenson.

This Safer Neighbourhood is a predominantly rural area, stretching from the boundary of the A511 at Bretby, Swadlincote, to the Staffordshire border at Newton Solney and up to the most northerly point of the area at Stenson fields which borders onto Derby City, a distance of around 11 miles.
